description: Really good product with a few bugs, but the support teams and williningness to provide flexible services where possible to continue building the product goes a long way.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software provides a nice interface to exchange documents and notes with auditees/auditors to keep the audit process moving. It's intuitive which avoids confusion when uploading documents and changing task status. The dashboards also provide a nice status summary of audits so both auditees and auditors know the status of fieldwork in real time. Most importantly the software comes with very timely and professional support when there are questions or issues.
cons: The reporting functions are a little over complicated. A feature to simply print to pdf/word report narrations, and tables without creating separate templates would be ideal. There is also a lack of reference points/user guides to help perform import function and generate reports. The guess and check methods of learning what the software will do in certain scenarios in inefficient, and a summary/user guide would be helpful to answer common questions, provide step by step procedures, warnings, FYIs, etc. One major item with importing is its unclear what gets overridden vs. is added in the software in addition, and this makes for a messy setup at time.

description: My experience has been very positive. Fieldguide continues to improve but I would like to see them to continue to offer different features and options to continue to make the overall experience more efficient.
author: Ben S.
pros: Live time updating and having the ability to have multiple people working on a single engagement.
cons: The review process in Fieldguide could be more efficient with the ability to have multiple different views so that someone could review a piece of evidence while also reading a testing table that corresponds to the evidence.

review_title: Its Good and working hard towards becoming better
description: My overall experience is good however, editing files especially PDF seems to be difficult in the application.
author: KUNAL G.
pros: Easy to navigate, it saves a lot of time to communicate for a data request from client.
cons: PDF Edit seems harder in the application.

author: Chris K.
pros: Fieldguide has been a wonderful tool to facilitate our audits; clients love the ease of use, and the tool has streamlined collaboration with our team members across the globe.
cons: Can't think of anything - Fieldguide has been great!

author: Taja W.
pros: Fieldguide is extremely user friendly for all levels of expertise. It is excellent for document management and keeping connected with team tasks.
cons: I have not had a negative experience with Fieldguide yet!

author: Tim W.
pros: The product is great but the customer support and service make it best in class.
cons: As we move to a more automated solution it was a challenge to reengineer our internal processes to match Fieldguide's capabilities.

author: Jodi H.
pros: The linkage and mapping in the background which reduces a lot of the administrative work we used to have to deal with.
cons: Handling of tasks (filtering, deleting, addressing, inability to add on certain things)

review_title: Fieldguide from a it auditor persepective
author: Sandy P.
pros: Fieldguide seamlessly digitizes the entire engagement lifecycle, delivering unparalleled efficiency and effectiveness.One of the standout features of Field Guide is its all-in-one approach. Gone are the days of juggling multiple tools and systems to manage engagements. Field Guide consolidates everything onto a single platform, streamlining our workflows and reducing manual effort. This has significantly improved our productivity, allowing us to focus on delivering top-notch service to our clients.
cons: When importing a excel sheet to fieldguide to create samples it can get sometimes buggy where it doesn’t match up right in fieldguide. For example columns and rows don’t match up.

description: Incredibly positive. Their support team is second to none and incredibly responsive, and they seek feedback frequently and often. I see the fruit of that feedback as well in the product.
author: James R.
pros: Redundancy reduction, thoughtful workflows, client integration, process streamlining
cons: Flexible but has its limits, newer features / service offerings continue to mature

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The responsiveness of the Fieldguide team. When an issue or concern is brought up they are always quick to respond and a fix is usually not far behind!
cons: More information (Key number, document title, etc.) would be helpful on the e-mail notifications. Occasionally it can become slow.

author: Mike L.
pros: FieldGuide is very easy to use, multiple users can edit at once!
cons: Minor design limitations and bulk editing

author: Lizzie S.
pros: The product is very user friendly. There are also a lot of functions such as the filtering that make it easy to find what you are looking for.
cons: The only con for this product is that sometimes when scrolling the screen will jump.

author: Charles W.
pros: Ease of use, overall workflow, client experience, document and request management
cons: 1) Would be nice to have some reporting capabilities that span across all of our clients using form fields or some other metric (e.g. a report of all clients that we identified in a form as having an ISO 27001 or other certification 2) Ability to assign admins at a project level

author: Christian J.
pros: The user interface is very easy to use and provides alot of detail.
cons: Sometimes Fieldguide will glitch out and I will have to restart browser.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: FIELDGUIDE IS A MUST HAVE AUDIT TOOL
description: 10/10 - Went from working in spreadsheets to fieldguide and it makes everything much easier, saves time, allows you to see changes made to documentation and AI is great.
author: Husnain K.
pros: Streamlines auditing process and makes it much easier to document compared to using traditional spreadsheets. Can collaborate with clients and clients really like the requests feature.
cons: Nothing comes to mind, can provide feedback to their team and they can add it as an improvement they'll consider

review_title: Better than all the other solutions for completing security compliance assessments.
description: Great customer success team. There are many opportunities to streamline and automate tasks that were heavily manual in the past.
author: Shane P.
pros: Automation of reports. Ability to create cross-mapped engagements, and streamline processes for both the client and my team.
cons: Support for cross-mapped engagements is good but can use improvement in a few areas.
author_profession: Managing Director of Information Assurance Services

description: I really enjoy using Fieldguide. It is efficient to have all your workpapers from the client in one spot, pick samples, and complete testing.
author: Ashley M.
pros: Fieldguide is user freindly for all engagements. I can use it for SOX testing, SOC reports, and internal audits.
cons: When there are excel files, you can only open them in the online version and edit it. If you open it in the desktop version, your changes could be lost.

review_title: Other name for professional excellence = Field guide
author: John R.
pros: Client -auditor excellent interaction tool.
cons: Reporting parent engagement, exception rating compilation others

description: its great! I use it every day! It has become an extension of my team and I's work.
author: Sean M.
pros: The AI features. These save me a ton of time filling our inherent risk and also with request lists.
cons: I dont like how the sheet column changes on SOC Attribute Testing Sheets

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Updates upon feedback are considered proactively. AI features are innovative and useful for my daily job. Feels like I am using a cutting edge technology for my use case.
cons: Setting up new engagements (at first), but carrying them over year over year is easy to do.

description: Through Fieldguide we have automated the tracking or processing of our most time-consuming SOC2 processes which enable us to provide a higher quality and more consistent end-result year-over-year. Fieldguide also enables us to embrace each engagements unique components without shoehorning boilerplate into our processes and documents.
author: Chris W.
pros: Fieldguide is clearly designed and innovated with the auditor's perspective in-mind. From engagement setup to statistical sampling and tracking client submissions, it makes the auditor's life easier. In addition, the onboarding experience is the best we've had with any product in the technical space. Our onboarding resources clearly knew the product, auditor workflow, and were excellent guides.
cons: The only area we would like to see improvement in currently is adding additional frameworks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I had a tough time learning the software and getting used to the layout and functionality. It made the audit easier in some regards but more difficult in other regards. Overall, I think it was a little better than our previous audit methods, but there is much room for improvement. Customer service was excellent and always helped us with questions and with implementing new features.
author: Stephen H.
pros: The best feature was being able to work in the audit sheets and documents simultaneously with other auditors.
cons: Document organization (moving documents, signing off, deleting, renaming, etc) was clunky and time consuming - being able to perform edits on multiple documents at once would be very helpful.

review_title: Fieldguide a perfect tool for SOC Engagements
author: Francis D.
pros: The dashboard is really good, I like how it shows all your tasks and what requests are open, ready for review, or changed requested. The look of the tool is very modern and way better than PFX. I prefer working on Fieldguide then PFX.
cons: I've had sometimes the website crash on me when i'm in a documenting and testing the controls. Fieldguide could be more smooth. The editing tools for tagging documents could use a overhaul such as adding more features. For example adobe allows me to add stamps. I wish Fieldguide can do that.

author: Malcolm A.
pros: ability to customize dashboards and that the tasks are available to on page start up
cons: Sometimes hard to find evidence and filtering can cause some headache

author: Mark W.
pros: I like the ability to manage multiple engagements all in one place. The ability to review and document audit procedures across multiple engagements without logging in to different tools. The ability to review documentation in the application without opening other applications.
cons: Setting up existing reviews with imports and such was a learning curve but have improved since the beginning.
